prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-CONSTRUCTION-PLAY-SET Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: Kidplay Construction Toys DIY Playset with Dump Truck, Storage Box, Yellow, Boys, Ages 3+ Description: Recreate the hustle and bustle of a busy construction site with this awesome and super fun 22pc DIY Construction Toys Playset from KidPlay.

The construction trucks playset is a unique, multi-piece assembly kids toy, complete with dump truck, digger truck, excavation truck and assembly tools. Not only will your little one be occupied for hours with this engaging playset, half the fun of it is putting the whole construction toys kit together; with 21 pieces to assemble, crafty, DIY-inclined kiddies will have a blast working with friends or family to create the the three different construction trucks. All the pieces have been designed with little hands in mind, so kids can easily maneuver the tools and parts as they work on assembly.

And lastly, this construction toys playset will not only provide hours of playtime fun, kids will be engaging in crucial early educational activities, like working their fine motor and gross motor skills, as well as exercising their cognitive problem solving through these DIY building and imaginative pretend play sessions.

Lastly, all the play pieces of this construction toys kit, fit neatly in the included storage box for easy organization, and to ensure pieces aren't lost along the way. The plastic storage box with handle makes this a great toy for boys to travel with, as everything can be tucked away and safely stowed when not in use.

Let the construction begin.

Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts

Recommended Ages: 3+ Search Terms: toys for boys holiday toy list 2021 christmas gift hanukkah gifts stocking stuffer learning and education toys pretend play cosplay roleplay gifts under 50 dollars toddlers kids travel toy Features: - DIY CONSTRUCTION TOYS PLAYSET: This fun and engaging construction toys assembly playset with handy storage bin takes DIY playtime to new level! Kids can assemble and convert these construction toys into 3 different toy vehicles, a dump truck, an excavator and digger truck, allowing for lots of fun DIY playtime and pretend play possibilities! - FINE MOTOR TOYS: Not only will your little engineer have so much fun putting together this DIY construction toys playset, toddlers and kids will also be developing their hand eye coordination, dexterity and fine and gross motor skills, as they convert the toy components into different configurations - STEM TOYS: Make little ones playtime both fun and educational with this fun stem toy! This DIY construction toys assembly playset for toddlers and young children introduces construction, engineering, assembly and critical thinking skills to children as young as three through building and assembly - GREAT TODDLER TOYS FOR TRAVEL: All the construction toys pieces fit neatly into the included storage bin when toys not in use; great for travel, the plastic storage box snaps closed to keep contents secure and also features a handy carry handle for when you're on the go! - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 8.5 x 5.5 x 4.5 inches; Color: Yellow; Weight: 0.85lbs; Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts); Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
